name: Commodore 64
description: Commodore's 8-bit home computer platform, famous for the SID sound chip, strong sprite hardware, and one of the largest classic computer game libraries.

eras.title: Early Home Computer Era
eras.description: The C64 establishes itself through strong arcade-style games, home-computer conversions, and early original hits.

eras.title: SID and Action Peak Era
eras.description: Mature period of technically impressive games, iconic music, European development, and major action releases.

eras.title: Late Budget Era
eras.description: Late commercial support through budget releases, compilations, and the platform's long tail.
